label_verbatim: (Name of Unincorporated Entity Prior to Conversion)
rationale: Pre-conversion name of the unincorporated entity. Mirrors MBCA-21 (corp → unincorporated) which uses entity.name for the pre-conversion party. Note: 'unincorporated entity' includes domestic Maine LLCs/LPs (entity.name) and foreign equivalents (where home_jurisdiction_name might apply), but the form labels the field generically — use entity.name.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the unincorporated entity is changed as follows (the same must satisfy the requirements of 13-C MRSA §401)
rationale: Post-conversion corporate name. Must satisfy 13-C MRSA §401 corporate-naming requirements (suffix: 'Corp.', 'Corporation', 'Inc.', 'Incorporated', etc.). Same key as MBCA-21.

label_verbatim: SECOND: (Foreign Unincorporated Entity Only) The unincorporated entity was organized in (state or country)
rationale: State or country where the foreign unincorporated entity was organized. Conditional — applies only when the converting entity is foreign (Check Box5 selected).

label_verbatim: SECOND: ...and the date of organization was
rationale: Date the foreign unincorporated entity was originally formed. Conditional on foreign status. Same key as MLLC-12's 'Date of formation'.

label_verbatim: THIRD: [ ] (Domestic Unincorporated Entity) The plan of entity conversion was duly approved by the unincorporated entity in accordance with the organic law of the unincorporated entity
rationale: Radio option for domestic-source-law approval. Enum value: 'domestic'. Mutually exclusive with Check Box5.

label_verbatim: THIRD: [ ] (Foreign Unincorporated Entity) The conversion of the unincorporated entity was duly approved in the manner required by its organic law
rationale: Radio option for foreign-source-law approval. Enum value: 'foreign'. Mutually exclusive with Check Box4. Selecting this implies SECOND fields (entity.home_jurisdiction, entity.formation_date_in_home_jurisdiction) must be populated.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: All the statements required to be set forth in Articles of Incorporation (Form MBCA-6-1) are attached as Exhibit ___
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for the attached Articles of Incorporation provisions (typically a completed-but-unsigned MBCA-6-1). Same key as MBCA-21.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The effective date of the articles of entity conversion (if other than the date of filing of the articles of entity conversion) is
rationale: Optional future effective date. If blank, filing date applies. Same key as MBCA-21 and merger.future_effective_date on MBCA-10.

label_verbatim: DATED
rationale: Date of signature.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of any duly authorized representative) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity widget. Shape D (matches MBCA-21, MBCA-11, MLLC-12). Footnote allows signature by 'an officer or other duly authorized representative' per 13-C MRSA §955.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1; universal handle for entity name on this filing.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
label_verbatim: Name of entity [2]
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 — typically populated with the bundled MBCA-6-1 entity name.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.

label_verbatim: 24-hour expedited filing
rationale: Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.

label_verbatim: Immediate expedited filing
rationale: Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'.

label_verbatim: Total fee(s) enclosed: $
rationale: Total fees ($145 base per page-0 header, plus expedite premium and bundled MBCA-6-1 fee).

label_verbatim: (Name of contact person)
rationale: Contact name.

label_verbatim: (Daytime telephone number)
rationale: Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: (Contact email address for this filing)
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email (applies to the post-conversion corporation).

label_verbatim: (Name of attested copy recipient)
rationale: Recipient name.

label_verbatim: (Firm or Company)
rationale: Recipient firm.

label_verbatim: (Mailing Address)
rationale: Recipient street.

label_verbatim: (City, State & Zip)
rationale: Recipient city/state/zip combined.
